resources.string: How are you doing today? <breath> This is a text-to-speech engine using next generation Kaldi. I wanted to test a longer paragraph with natural pauses, clearer emotion, and a few expressive markers. <laugh> Sometimes a small laugh makes the sentence feel more conversational, especially when the demo is running fully offline on a phone. Now let us continue with another sentence so the model has more context and enough duration for playback testing. <sigh> Finally, this closing line should sound calmer and a little more reflective before the audio ends.
